mapper.select: SELECT * FROM tb_od_plan WHERE deleted = 0 ORDER BY CASE half WHEN '상반기' THEN 0 WHEN '하반기' THEN 1 ELSE 2 END, start_date ASC, id DESC
SELECT * FROM tb_od_plan WHERE id = #{id} AND deleted = 0
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM tb_od_plan WHERE deleted = 0
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM tb_od_plan WHERE deleted = 0 AND status = #{status}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO tb_od_plan (half, org_name, method, start_date, end_date, target_count, hazard_factors, mgr, status, note, deleted, created_by_user_id, created_by_name, created_by_team, created_by_position, created_at, modified_at) VALUES ( #{half}, #{orgName}, #{method}, #{startDate,jdbcType=DATE}, #{endDate,jdbcType=DATE}, #{targetCount}0, #{hazardFactors}, #{mgr}, #{status}'계획', #{note}, 0, #{createdByUserId}, #{createdByName}, #{createdByTeam}, #{createdByPosition}, GETDATE(), GETDATE())
mapper.update: UPDATE tb_od_plan SET half = #{half}, org_name = #{orgName}, method = #{method}, start_date = #{startDate,jdbcType=DATE}, end_date = #{endDate,jdbcType=DATE}, target_count = #{targetCount}0, hazard_factors = #{hazardFactors}, mgr = #{mgr}, status = #{status}, note = #{note}, modified_at = GETDATE() WHERE id = #{id}
UPDATE tb_od_plan SET deleted = 1, modified_at = GETDATE() WHERE id = #{id}
